home.hero.title: Craft Cocktails, Antique Spirit
home.hero.description: A home inspired by Antique Cafe, cocktail-focused: immersive atmosphere, visual menu and signature experiences.
home.story.title: About The Bar
home.story.p1: A modern take on classics: textures, glassware and aromatics. The style borrows from Antique Cafe with a full-drinks direction.
home.story.p2: The menu above is loaded dynamically from the cocktails API to keep the home page alive.

auth.common.benefit.fast: Fast email and password flow for demos and future JWT hookup.
auth.common.benefit.jwt: Designed to receive a real JWT provider next without rewriting the screens.
auth.common.benefit.demo: The visual system stays aligned with every existing app theme.
auth.fields.displayName.label: Display name
auth.fields.email.label: Email

auth.validation.passwordStrength: Use at least 8 characters with upper, lower and a number.
auth.validation.displayNameLength: Use at least 2 characters for the display name.
auth.login.title: Welcome to Blendbook.
auth.login.description: Sign in with a clean flow that already matches the app themes and is ready for JWT-backed auth.
auth.login.formDescription: Use your email and password. The backend token provider will plug into this form next.
auth.login.hint: Need an account for the demo?
auth.login.toastReady: Login form is ready for Supabase JWT wiring.
auth.register.title: Create a demo account.
auth.register.description: A compact registration flow with validation, theme-aware surfaces and JWT-ready structure.
auth.register.passwordHint: Password must include 8 characters, upper, lower and a number.
auth.register.switchCta: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.register.sideDescription: This screen is prepared for a later provider such as Supabase, including fields you can send directly to signup endpoints.
auth.register.toastReady: Registration form is ready for Supabase JWT wiring.
